scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run generate-image-manifest && npm run sitemap-images.xml && npm run sitemap-index.xml && npm run update-sitemap-lastmod
scripts.seo:auditar-backlinks:default: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); const input = './SEO/backlinks-bing.csv'; if (!fs.existsSync(input)) { console.log('[seo:auditar-backlinks:default] Arquivo ./SEO/backlinks-bing.csv não encontrado; rotina ignorada.'); process.exit(0); } const npmCmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npm.cmd' : 'npm'; const result = spawnSync(npmCmd, ['run', 'seo:auditar-backlinks', '--', '--input', input, '--min-score', '60', '--top', '50'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.build:checks: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const npmCmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npm.cmd' : 'npm'; const checks = ['seo:auditar-backlinks:default', 'lint:tags', 'test:h1', 'sitemap-images.xml', 'sitemap-index.xml', 'submit-indexnow']; let failed = false; for (const check of checks) { const result = spawnSync(npmCmd, ['run', check], { stdio: 'inherit' }); if ((result.status ?? 1) !== 0) failed = true; } process.exit(failed ? 1 : 0);"
scripts.build: npm run build:app && npm run build:checks
